Task.Name: Phase 1 - Initialization
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Bosch IT

Task.Name: QG0 - Programme Kick-Off Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Programme formally initiated; SteerCo constituted; all workstream leads confirmed; proceed to Phase 1

Task.Name: 1.1 Project Setup and Governance
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Appoint Programme Leads – Seller and Solar Business
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CIO + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Establish Steering Committee and Governance Model
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + Solar Senior Mgmt

Task.Name: Define RACI, Workstream Leads and Escalation Path
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Set Up PMO Tools, Collaboration Site and Reporting Cadence
Task.Notes: Resources: PMO + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Signing - Frozen Zone Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + Solar Executive | No Solar IT production changes without SteerCo approval from this date

Task.Name: 1.2 Solar IT Landscape Assessment (17 worldwide sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) | 17 sites across EMEA, Americas and APAC

Task.Name: Solar IT Inventory Request (Apps / Infra / Devices / Data)
Task.Notes: Resources: Solar IT PM | 2600 users; global footprint

Task.Name: Location List – 17 Worldwide Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Solar IT + Facilities | Sites across EMEA, Americas and APAC to be confirmed per region

Task.Name: Legal Entity Identification – Buyer Entity Registration
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance | Buyer entity legal setup; change-of-control planning; undisclosed buyer engagement

Task.Name: Identify Solar IT Dependencies on Bosch Shared Services
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects | Full TSA scope from Bosch shared services consumed by Solar business

Task.Name: 1.3 Project Charter and Scope Definition
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Draft Hamburger Project Charter
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Solar IT PM

Task.Name: Define Scope Boundaries – Solar IT Only, Stand Alone
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Bosch IT | 17 sites; 2600 users; Stand Alone model; no Merger Zone

Task.Name: Global IT Workstream Kickoff Workshop
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads

Task.Name: Solar IT Standalone Operating Framework Agreement
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance + Bosch IT | Confirm Stand Alone model; no Merger Zone; direct Bosch IT hand-over to Buyer

Task.Name: Project Charter Approval
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee

Task.Name: QG1 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Charter approved; full inventory confirmed; governance accepted; budget baseline submitted; proceed to Concept

Task.Name: Phase 2 - Concept
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: 2.1 Detailed As-Is Analysis
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Application Landscape Inventory – Solar Business
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) | Full app inventory across all 17 sites; flag Bosch shared platform dependencies

Task.Name: IT Infrastructure As-Is Mapping – 17 Global Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra Team | Site surveys covering EMEA, Americas, APAC

Task.Name: ERP / SAP Landscape Analysis – Solar Business Scope
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team | Identify Solar-specific ERP instances and shared SAP mandants

Task.Name: Data Ownership and Separation Rules
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Legal | Identify Solar data vs Bosch corporate data; confirm separation approach

Task.Name: Contract and Licence Inventory
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Procurement + IT | Change-of-control clause review for all Solar applications and licences

Task.Name: HR IT Systems Mapping – Solar Business Users
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch HR IT | Global payroll and HR systems for 2600 Solar users

Task.Name: 2.2 Standalone IT Architecture Design
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Architecture Concept Workshop – Stand Alone Model
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + Buyer IT Architects | Confirm Stand Alone model; define Solar IT target state; no Merger Zone

Task.Name: Network Architecture Design – 17 Global Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) | Solar LAN/WAN across EMEA, Americas, APAC; international links required

Task.Name: Active Directory Design – Solar Standalone Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch AD Team | New AD forest for Solar; fully separate from Bosch corporate AD

Task.Name: M365 and Azure Tenant Design – Solar Entity
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team | New M365 tenant for Solar; 2600 mailboxes; Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive in scope

Task.Name: ERP / SAP Separation Design
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team | SAP client copy or greenfield decision; data migration scope for ERP

Task.Name: Security Architecture Design – Solar Standalone
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CISO | Solar security architecture independent of Bosch; ISO 27001 baseline

Task.Name: 2.3 Solar IT Migration Strategy
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + All WS Leads

Task.Name: Application Categorisation and Wave Planning
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + WS Leads | Multi-wave migration required given 17 sites and global scope

Task.Name: Data Separation Rules Finalised
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Legal

Task.Name: TSA Service Catalogue Definition
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT | Services Bosch provides to Solar/Buyer under TSA; define exit criteria per service

Task.Name: Solar IT Operating Model (post-TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT Architects | Solar standalone operating model after TSA exit; global IT model

Task.Name: 2.4 Planning and Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + IT PM

Task.Name: Detailed Project Plan Development
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + IT PM

Task.Name: Risk Register Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + All WS Leads

Task.Name: Resource Plan and Budget Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: Finance + IT PM

Task.Name: QG2 - Concept Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Architecture approved; Stand Alone model agreed; TSA catalogue defined; ERP strategy decided; proceed to Development

Task.Name: Phase 3 - Development and Build
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams

Task.Name: 3.1 Solar IT Infrastructure Build
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra + Partners

Task.Name: Network Setup – 17 Global Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra + WAN Provider | Solar LAN/WAN across all 17 sites; MPLS or SD-WAN; international connectivity

Task.Name: Data Centre and Server Infrastructure Build – Solar
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra | Primary and DR DC for Solar; cloud or co-lo per region

Task.Name: Active Directory Build – Solar Standalone Forest
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch AD Team | Foundation for all 2600 Solar users and applications

Task.Name: M365 Tenant Provisioning – Solar (2600 Mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Azure Team

Task.Name: Azure and Cloud Environment Setup – Solar
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Cloud Team

Task.Name: Security and IAM Platform Setup – Solar Standalone
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CISO

Task.Name: 3.2 ERP / SAP Separation and Build
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team + Migration Partner

Task.Name: SAP System Separation – Solar Mandant Copy or Greenfield
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team | Critical path: SAP separation drives application migration dependencies

Task.Name: ERP Data Cleansing and Validation
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team + Migration Partner

Task.Name: ERP Integration Testing – Solar Standalone
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team

Task.Name: 3.3 Application Migration Preparation
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Application Reclassification and Assignment
Task.Notes: Resources: Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC) + Bosch IT | Assign each Solar app to Standalone or retain in Bosch

Task.Name: Application Adaptation for Solar Standalone Environment
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams | Re-point app configurations from Bosch to Solar domain / AD / M365

Task.Name: Data Migration Preparation – Solar Business Data
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: 3.4 Client Device Migration (2600 Devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP Team

Task.Name: Device Inventory and Assessment – 2600 Solar Users
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Asset Mgmt | Global device inventory across 17 sites

Task.Name: Device Reimaging and Configuration – Solar Standard Image
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CWP Team | Solar domain image for 2600 devices; staged rollout across sites

Task.Name: 3.5 TSA Framework Finalisation
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Legal

Task.Name: TSA Service Descriptions Finalised – Global Scope
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT | Each TSA service must have an exit date and acceptance criteria

Task.Name: TSA SLA and KPI Framework
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Legal

Task.Name: TSA Contracts Legal Review and Finalisation
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal

Task.Name: QG3 - Development Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Solar infra ready; all apps packaged; 2600 devices configured; ERP separated; TSA contracts signed; proceed to Testing

Task.Name: Phase 4 - Testing and Cutover
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams

Task.Name: 4.1 System Integration Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Integration Testing – All Solar Applications
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams + Test Team

Task.Name: ERP / SAP End-to-End Regression Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch ERP / SAP Team

Task.Name: User Acceptance Testing (UAT) – Global
Task.Notes: Resources: Business Key Users | Solar IT and business users confirm Day 1 / GoLive readiness across all 17 sites

Task.Name: Security and Penetration Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch CISO | Solar standalone environment penetration test; data residency confirmed per region

Task.Name: UAT Sign-Off
Task.Notes: Resources: Business Leads + IT PM

Task.Name: 4.2 Cutover Preparation
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + All WS

Task.Name: Cutover Plan Finalisation
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + WS Leads

Task.Name: End-User Communication – Solar Business (2600 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + Bosch IT | Communication to all Solar users across 17 global sites

Task.Name: Dress Rehearsal and Cutover Simulation
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads

Task.Name: Help Desk Activation and Training – Solar Global
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | Global support coverage for Solar users across 17 sites

Task.Name: Go No-Go Readiness Assessment
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee

Task.Name: QG4 - Pre-GoLive Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | UAT passed; all systems ready; cutover plan approved; Day 1 / GoLive confirmed for 01 Dec 2026

Task.Name: Phase 5 - GoLive and Stabilisation
Task.Notes: Resources: All Workstreams | Phase 5 spans Day 1 (GoLive) through 90-day hypercare to 01 Mar 2027

Task.Name: 5.1 Day 1 GoLive Activities
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Business

Task.Name: Day 1 / GoLive – Solar IT Separation Effective (D1)
Task.Notes: Resources: Executive Leadership | Day 1 = GoLive (same event). Solar IT fully separated from Bosch; legal separation effective

Task.Name: Network Domain Cutover to Solar Active Directory
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch Infra

Task.Name: Application Day 1 / GoLive Activation – All Solar Apps
Task.Notes: Resources: App Teams

Task.Name: Bosch TSA Residual Services Activated
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT | TSA clock starts Day 1 (01 Dec 2026); Bosch-to-Solar residual services; TSA exit target May 2027

Task.Name: User Go-Live Communication (Solar Business 2600 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Comms + Bosch IT

Task.Name: 5.2 Hypercare – 90 Calendar Days (3 Months)
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads + IT Ops | Hypercare period: Day 1 (01 Dec 2026) to 01 Mar 2027 = 90 calendar days

Task.Name: Daily Operations Review Meetings
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + WS Leads | Global standup cadence; focus on Solar systems stability during 90-day hypercare

Task.Name: Incident Management and P1/P2 Issue Resolution
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops + Help Desk

Task.Name: TSA SLA Compliance Monitoring
Task.Notes: Resources: IT Ops | Bosch residual TSA monitored throughout hypercare; full exit by QG5 (May 2027)

Task.Name: Hypercare Close – Formal Sign-Off (90 days from Day 1)
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare complete; 90 calendar days from GoLive / Day 1 (01 Dec 2026)

Task.Name: 5.3 TSA Exit and Bosch Service Termination
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT

Task.Name: TSA Exit Planning per Service
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Bosch IT | Define exit criteria and acceptance tests per remaining TSA service

Task.Name: TSA Service Exit – All 17 Sites
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT

Task.Name: TSA Exit Confirmation (All Bosch Services Terminated)
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch + Buyer Executive

Task.Name: Phase 6 - Programme Closure
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Stabilisation Milestone – Hypercare and TSA Complete
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | Hypercare 90 days complete; TSA fully exited; Solar IT fully independent; proceed to programme closure

Task.Name: 6.1 Closure Activities
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + All WS Leads

Task.Name: Lessons Learned Workshop
Task.Notes: Resources: All WS Leads

Task.Name: Knowledge Transfer to Buyer IT Organisation
Task.Notes: Resources: Bosch IT + Buyer IT | Formal knowledge transfer for all Solar IT domains

Task.Name: IT Contract and Asset Transfer Documentation
Task.Notes: Resources: Legal + Finance + IT PM

Task.Name: Document Archiving – All Programme Records
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Legal | All programme documents archived per Bosch standards; required before QG5 closure gate

Task.Name: Programme Closure Report
Task.Notes: Resources: IT PM + Erik Ho (BD/MIL-ICC)

Task.Name: Final Programme Sign-Off
Task.Notes: Resources: Executive Leadership

Task.Name: QG5 - Programme Closure Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: Steering Committee | QG5 = completion gate. All docs archived; KT complete; contracts transferred; Solar IT handed over; Hamburger closed
